description:
✈ Want to travel with us in real life? We’re hosting our first-ever group trip to Vietnam this January, and you’re invited. Spots are limited → https://trovatrip.com/trip/asia/vietnam/vietnam-with-juliana-and-martin-gomez-jan-2026

Planning a trip to Madrid? Discover the best things to do, eat, and see in Spain's vibrant capital city. From famous landmarks to hidden local spots, this Madrid travel guide will help you make the most of your 48 hours. Get inspired for your ultimate Madrid itinerary with must-visit places, delicious food experiences, and unforgettable sights. Perfect for first-time visitors and weekend travelers!

🛡️ Get 2 YEARS + 4 extra months of NordVPN https://nordvpn.com/local 

🖥️ Blogs on Spain + Google Map of everywhere we went: https://touristtolocal.com/spain/

*Looking for tours in Madrid? Here are some of our favorites that are led by local guides!*
🍷 Paella and Sangria Workshop: https://getyourguide.tp.st/2eGBKS6g
🤤 Tapas tour: https://getyourguide.tp.st/vcydIX5c
🚶Walking tour with churros: https://getyourguide.tp.st/CyWmYFLt

*KEEP US ON THE ROAD*
☕️ Buy us a coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/tourist2local

🤗 Other ways to keep us on the road: https://touristtolocal.com/support/

🌎 See everywhere we've been + read our detailed travel guides: https://touristtolocal.com/destinations/

*THINGS WE RECOMMEND*
💳 Our TOP travel credit cards: https://touristtolocal.com/tourist-to-local-travel-credit-cards/

📲 Follow our Instagram! https://www.instagram.com/touristtolocal 
✈️ Everything you need to plan your trips: https://touristtolocal.com/resources
📧 Work with us: https://touristtolocal.com/work-with-us/
——————————————————
👋About Us
We're Juliana and Martín! She’s from the USA, he’s from Mexico. We’re here to help you turn your trips into culture and value-packed adventures.

Think the travel world’s only split into hardcore backpackers and tick-the-box tourists? We call nonsense. You’re out to see a destination’s must see spots, but also to sneak off the tourist path to find the spots that only locals go. You’re chasing experiences with value, and we’ve got you. When you travel with us, it’s no fluff, just the good stuff—because your vacation deserves more than just scratching the surface.
——————————————————
Advertiser Disclosure:
Links listed are affiliate links, which means we make a small commission if you choose to sign up/purchase with these links.  This directly helps our channel.

🎥 CHAPTERS

7:23 Mercado San Miguel

13:31 Ferretería Restaurante
14:21 Los Gatos
15:27 Museo del Jamon
17:56 Royal Palace of Madrid
19:52 Larroceria
21:16 Santiago Bernabéu Stadium
22:26 Has madrid changed?
